feedback: Overcharged again and support could not care less.

Billing is standard nothing remarkable and support is also just average. Both work as expected without any notable positives or negatives. The entire experience is neutral which I suppose is acceptable but not exciting. This level of billing accuracy builds genuine trust with customers.

I have been trying to get a billing error of Rs 50 corrected for 7 days through customer support and the experience has been kafkaesque. Each agent says the previous agent should have fixed it and passes the buck. Nobody owns the problem and my money remains incorrectly deducted.

Support is average but the billing keeps showing small extra charges of Rs 599 that are hard to explain. The support interactions are unremarkable but the billing inconsistency is annoying even if individual amounts are small. This kind of support makes a real difference in customer experience.
Average billing experience. Standard for the industry.

custmer supprt exceeded my expectations when I reported a persistent coverage issue in Panaji main road. They escalated to their netwrk team provided a reference number and actually called me back within 7 days with an update. Proactive communication like this is extremely rare in telecom.

Average support standard billing and fair pricing at Rs 99. Nothing about this operator excites or disappoints.
